assignments.name: colleagueSignatureHtml
assignments.value:
Example Representative
Business Development Representative
Example company tagline.
Helping customers achieve their goals.
colleague@example.com
O 555 010 0001
M 555 010 0003
example.com
Book a meeting here

assignments.name: day30SmsBody
assignments.value:
Hi {{First Name}},
This is Example Representative with Example Company.
It has been a while since we last connected, and I wanted to see if timing has improved to revisit customer benefits, account reporting, or customer engagement initiatives.
Thank you.

parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Mobile_Phone_Number__c, MobilePhone, Status, Engagement_Status__c, Human_Override__c, IsConverted FROM Lead WHERE Engagement_Status__c = 'Dormant' AND IsConverted = false AND Email != null AND Status != 'Unqualified' AND Status != 'Do Not Contact' AND Human_Override__c = false ORDER BY LastModifiedDate ASC LIMIT " + $('Dormant Sequence Config').item.json.batchLimit }}

={{ "SELECT Id, Sequence_Status__c, Active_Sequence_Step__c, Next_Follow_Up_Date_Lead__c, Last_Sequence_Step_Sent__c, Last_Sequence_Email_Sent_At__c, Last_Sequence_Action_At__c, Sequence_Key__c FROM Engagement_Status_Tracker__c WHERE Related_Lead__c = '" + $json.Id + "' AND Sequence_Key__c = '" + $json.Id + "_Dormant' LIMIT 1" }}
={{ "SELECT Id, WhoId, Subject FROM Task WHERE WhoId = '" + $json.leadId + "' AND Subject = '" + $json.callTaskSubject + "' LIMIT 1" }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$input.item.json, taskFallback: true } }];

additionalFields.description:
={{ 'Dormant Re-Engagement — ' + $json.step + '

Lead: ' + $json.firstName + ' ' + $json.lastName + '
Email: ' + $json.email + '
Sequence Key: ' + $json.sequenceKey + '

Purpose: Determine continued viability.

Opening: Hi ' + $json.firstName + ', this is Example Representative with Example Company. It has been a while since we last connected, and I wanted to see if there have been any changes in your priorities regarding customer benefits, account reporting, or customer engagement initiatives.' }}
additionalFields.subject: ={{ $json.callTaskSubject }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$input.item.json, taskContextFallback: true } }];
return [{ json: { ...$input.item.json, emailContextFallback: true } }];

parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT Id, WhoId, Subject FROM Task WHERE WhoId = '" + $json.leadId + "' AND Subject = '" + $json.smsTaskSubject + "' LIMIT 1" }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$input.item.json, smsTaskFallback: true } }];

parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT Id, WhoId, Subject FROM Task WHERE WhoId = '" + $json.leadId + "' AND Subject = '" + $json.reviewTaskSubject + "' LIMIT 1" }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$input.item.json, reviewTaskFallback: true } }];
return [{ json: { ...$input.item.json, reviewCreateContextFallback: true } }];
return [{ json: { ...$input.item.json, smsCreateContextFallback: true } }];
